steps.t: Merethien, the Master Foodmonger of the Council, is in the Dome of the Sun. Arodor told you that Merethien could use your assistance.
Mirudal, the Warden of the Stores, is in the Dome of the Sun. Arodor told you that Mirudal could use your assistance.
